name: Grand Gedeh County (Liberia)
description: A horizontal pale-blue band across the upper third of the flag and a white field below; the Liberian national flag forms a canton in the upper hoist, an orange rayed sun stands in the upper fly, and a green hill-and-forest landscape sweeps across the lower half.
history: Presented by President William V. S. Tubman on 29 November 1965 together with the flags of the other Liberian counties.

features.symbolism: Grand Gedeh as part of the Republic of Liberia
the dawn of a new day in Grand Gedeh
the forested hill country of the county
